remarks: Welcome to this charming and cozy bungalow nestled in the heart of Norwalk-an ideal alternative to condo living without the fees! This delightful 2-bedroom, 2 full bath home offers the perfect blend of character, comfort, and convenience. Step inside to find beautiful hardwood floors throughout and a warm, inviting layout. A finished and heated loft provides valuable additional space-perfect for storage, a home office, or creative use. The exterior has been meticulously maintained, featuring durable Hardie board siding and a newer asphalt roof for peace of mind. Enjoy your own private backyard oasis, ideal for gardening, entertaining, or simply unwinding. The spacious deck is perfect for summer BBQs or relaxing evenings at home. Located just moments from The SoNo Collection, with easy access to I-95 and Route 7, and only minutes to the train station, restaurants, and vibrant local entertainment-this home truly offers it all. Don't miss this opportunity-schedule your private viewing today before it's gone!
